name: Far Too Loud
bio_en:
Far Too Loud, also known as Oli Cash, is a breakbeat and electro house producer and DJ based in Brighton, UK. He began his career in 2005, initially as part of a duo with Dom Smart, before continuing as a solo artist after Smart's departure in 2009.

In the early years, Far Too Loud focused on breakbeat music, drawing influences from the vibrant UK dance scene. His energetic productions quickly gained traction, making him a notable figure in local clubs and festivals.

His sound is characterized by high-energy beats and a knack for creating tracks that resonate on the dancefloor. This approach has earned him a reputation for producing music that encourages audience participation and excitement.

Throughout his career, Far Too Loud has released numerous tracks that have become staples in the sets of DJs across various genres. His work often blends elements of breakbeat with electro house, showcasing his versatility as a producer.

He has been associated with several key labels in the electronic music scene, which have helped to amplify his reach and influence. His tracks have been featured in various compilations and have received support from prominent DJs.

Collaboration has been a significant aspect of his career, working alongside artists such as Beardyman and Excision, which has further enriched his musical palette and audience reach.

Some of his most recognized tracks include 'Play It Loud' and 'Fundamental', both of which highlight his signature sound and have received positive feedback from the electronic music community.

As his career has progressed, Far Too Loud has experimented with different styles and genres, occasionally crossing into other electronic music territories while maintaining his core breakbeat roots.

Internationally, he has performed at various festivals and events, gaining a following beyond the UK. His dynamic live performances have contributed to his growing reputation as a must-see act in the electronic music scene.

In recent years, Far Too Loud has continued to evolve, releasing new music and maintaining his presence in the industry through various projects and collaborations.

His influence on the breakbeat and electro house scenes is notable, as he has inspired a new generation of producers and DJs with his innovative approach to music production.

Far Too Loud remains a relevant figure in contemporary electronic music, constantly pushing the boundaries of his sound and engaging with fans around the world.
bio_es:
Far Too Loud, también conocido como Oli Cash, es un productor y DJ de breakbeat y electro house con sede en Brighton, Reino Unido. Comenzó su carrera en 2005, inicialmente como parte de un dúo con Dom Smart, antes de continuar como artista en solitario tras la salida de Smart en 2009.

En sus primeros años, Far Too Loud se centró en la música breakbeat, inspirándose en la vibrante escena de baile del Reino Unido. Sus producciones enérgicas rápidamente ganaron tracción, convirtiéndolo en una figura notable en clubes y festivales locales.

Su sonido se caracteriza por ritmos de alta energía y una habilidad para crear pistas que resuenan en la pista de baile. Este enfoque le ha valido una reputación por producir música que fomenta la participación y la emoción del público.

A lo largo de su carrera, Far Too Loud ha lanzado numerosas pistas que se han convertido en elementos básicos en los sets de DJs de varios géneros. Su trabajo a menudo mezcla elementos de breakbeat con electro house, mostrando su versatilidad como productor.

Ha estado asociado con varios sellos clave en la escena de la música electrónica, lo que ha ayudado a amplificar su alcance e influencia. Sus pistas han sido presentadas en varias compilaciones y han recibido apoyo de DJs prominentes.

La colaboración ha sido un aspecto significativo de su carrera, trabajando junto a artistas como Beardyman y Excision, lo que ha enriquecido aún más su paleta musical y su alcance de audiencia.

Algunas de sus pistas más reconocidas incluyen 'Play It Loud' y 'Fundamental', ambas destacan su sonido característico y han recibido comentarios positivos de la comunidad de música electrónica.

A medida que su carrera ha progresado, Far Too Loud ha experimentado con diferentes estilos y géneros, cruzando ocasionalmente a otros territorios de la música electrónica mientras mantiene sus raíces en el breakbeat.

A nivel internacional, ha actuado en varios festivales y eventos, ganando un seguimiento más allá del Reino Unido. Sus dinámicas presentaciones en vivo han contribuido a su creciente reputación como un acto imperdible en la escena de la música electrónica.

En los últimos años, Far Too Loud ha continuado evolucionando, lanzando nueva música y manteniendo su presencia en la industria a través de varios proyectos y colaboraciones.

Su influencia en las escenas de breakbeat y electro house es notable, ya que ha inspirado a una nueva generación de productores y DJs con su enfoque innovador en la producción musical.

Far Too Loud sigue siendo una figura relevante en la música electrónica contemporánea, empujando constantemente los límites de su sonido y conectando con fans de todo el mundo.

key_releases.title: Play It Loud
key_releases.note: A notable track that showcases his energetic style.

key_releases.title: Fundamental
key_releases.note: Another key release that has been well received in the dance music community.
